summary: Workflow: Pester install duplicated across test/npm/pip jobs (3 instances); jobs nearly identical—use matrix or composite action. Scripts lack Set-StrictMode, $ErrorActionPreference best practices. No config validation (missing allowList/denyList keys unhandled). Parse-RequirementsTxt silently skips invalid formats. Good separation of concerns and naming; maintainability hampered by duplication and defensive programming gaps.
